title: [YTP] Markus and the Forbidden Potato
description:
Reuploaded. Screw titles.

I own none of the clips used and they belong to their respective owners, which is NOT me. This video is purely for comedic purposes.

Sources: Deathnote, Cogs of War 2 (by Johnny Utah), Team Fortress 2: Meet the Scout, and Gears of Awesome (by Egoraptor).

8,000 views!? w00t! To think the original had about 300. Let's thank the bastard that flagged it for all these views.
